name: codex-python-lsp
description: Codex plugin package that runs lsmcp with the pyright preset for Python language intelligence.

interface.shortDescription: Python language intelligence for Codex via MCP.
interface.longDescription: Adds Pyright-backed Python navigation, symbol lookup, and diagnostics to Codex by shipping an npm plugin package that runs lsmcp with the pyright preset and a bundled workflow skill.
defaultPrompt: Use Python LSP tools to inspect this repository before editing.
Find the definition and references for this Python symbol.
Summarize the top diagnostics in the current Python file.
